title: Graphical C(3)-T(6) implies CAT(0)
abstract: Graphical small cancellation extends the classical small cancellation theory and provides a powerful method for constructing groups with interesting features. In the classical setting, C(3)-T(6) small cancellation complexes are known to admit locally CAT(0) metrics. In this paper, we construct locally CAT(0) metrics for graphical C(3)-T(6) complexes.
